description: Style Note clutches are the latest rage these days. Whether Indian or Western, plain or blingy, everyone is flaunting one! Check out these stylish clutches from bulchee and show off your classy style with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable.  Product Details Purple floral designed two-fold wallet with a flap fastened by a press button closure Has eleven card slots, one zippered pocket, two insert pockets, a buttoned pocket and two id holders One insert pocket at the back Branding on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth Size Dimensions: 19 cm x 10 cm
